message:
feat: AppSpec/AppHandle, evidence ledger module, GenServer lifecycle budgets, and Outcome equality

AppSpec application layer (src/app.rs):
- Introduce AppSpec builder for describing application supervision
  trees with optional budget overrides and child specs
- AppHandle for managing started applications: stop (cancel root,
  drain, finalize, quiescence) and join (poll terminal outcome)
- Drop bomb on AppHandle to prevent silent resource leaks, matching
  the GradedObligation pattern
- Invariants: close implies quiescence, cancel-correct stop sequence,
  no ambient authority (all capabilities flow through Cx)

Evidence Ledger module (src/evidence.rs, bd-2dfoo):
- Unified EvidenceRecord schema for all Spork subsystem decisions:
  Supervision, Registry, Link, Monitor
- Subsystem enum + Verdict enum (Restart, Stop, Escalate, Accept,
  Reject, Propagate, etc.)
- EvidenceDetail enum carrying subsystem-specific constraint data:
  SupervisionDetail (binding constraints), RegistryDetail (lease
  accept/reject/cleanup), LinkDetail (exit propagation), MonitorDetail
  (down notification delivery)
- Deterministic rendering: pure function of the record, identical
  inputs produce byte-for-byte identical output
- Append-only EvidenceLedger with query/filter/render capabilities
- Register in lib.rs as pub mod evidence

GenServer lifecycle budget and cancellation masking (bd-3ejoi):
- PhaseBudgetGuard: RAII guard that temporarily tightens the task
  budget for init and stop phases. On drop, restores the original
  budget minus actual consumption during the phase (poll_quota,
  cost_quota tracking via saturating subtraction)
- AsyncMaskGuard: RAII cancellation mask for async contexts, since
  Cx::masked() is synchronous-only. Increments/decrements mask_depth
  on CxInner with MAX_MASK_DEPTH safety check
- GenServer::on_start_budget() hook (default: Budget::INFINITE) for
  bounding init phase resource consumption
- GenServer::on_stop_budget() hook (default: Budget::MINIMAL) for
  bounded cleanup
- Init phase: skip on_start if already cancelled, with trace event
- Stop phase: apply stop budget + cancellation mask before drain;
  calls during drain are aborted (reply_permit.abort()) instead of
  dispatched, casts and info messages still processed
- Rename trace events: gen_server::on_start -> gen_server::init,
  gen_server::on_stop -> gen_server::terminate
- Import Budget type for lifecycle hook return types
- StartBudgetProbe test verifying priority isolation between init
  and message loop phases

Outcome PartialEq/Eq (src/types/outcome.rs):
- Implement PartialEq for Outcome<T, E> where T: PartialEq, E: PartialEq
  with explicit match arms for Ok/Err/Cancelled/Panicked variants
- Implement Eq for Outcome<T, E> where T: Eq, E: Eq
- Enables structural comparison in evidence ledger tests and
  supervision decision assertions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
